name: method
value: Article reports a 9-inch propeller, six airspeeds from 0 to 17 m/s, four throttle steps, and 9000-rpm thrust/power trend ratios. It does not expose raw curve points or 5-inch FPV data, so use this packet as a forward-flow lead and digitization target.
note: Do not replace UIUC/APC/Mejzlik or true wind-on-thrust-stand CSV rows with this article-level packet.

name: UST republication
note: UST article mirrors the same 0..38 mph / 0..17 m/s Tyto wind-tunnel study lead.
